workflow_runs.name: .github/workflows/build.yml
workflow_runs.display_title: Harden send path: always surface "insufficient -> consolidate", never…

head_commit.message:
Harden send path: always surface "insufficient -> consolidate", never mask as internal error (v1.6.4)

Root cause of "balance is enough but can't send + scary 程序内部出错": a
fragmented mining wallet's spend fails as InsufficientBalance (the 6-note
per-tx cap), which should route to the consolidation prompt. But that
failure (or a null amount, or an analytics hiccup) could surface as a THROWN
exception and get shown as a generic internal error, masking the real,
actionable guidance. v1.6.2 hardened only the analytics calls before the
flow; this closes the remaining gaps.

- SendViewModel.send(): replace `zatoshiAmount!!` with an explicit, friendly
  guard; wrap the onEach updateMetrics/reportFailures in runCatching so
  reporting can never break the transaction stream.
- SendFragment.runSend(): on a caught throwable, scan the whole cause chain
  for "insufficient" and route to NeedConsolidate instead of a generic error
  (full stack trace still logged for pinpointing genuine internal bugs).
- SendScreen: clarify the consolidation guidance — "balance is enough, just
  too fragmented; max 6 notes per send; nothing was spent".

Balance "doesn't match" is the displayed *available* (spendable, witness-at-
anchor, 10-confirmation) balance legitimately differing from total; the home
card already shows the gap as 待确认 +X. No balance math change.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.8 <noreply@anthropic.com>

workflow_runs.name: Build DragonX Wallet APK
workflow_runs.display_title: Fix missing outbound transactions in history via catch-up re-enhance …

head_commit.message:
Fix missing outbound transactions in history via catch-up re-enhance (v1.6.3)

Outbound payments are recovered only during the "enhance" step (full tx
download + OVK output recovery); the compact-block scan alone records the
spend (so balance is correct) but writes no sent_notes. Enhance failures
(e.g. a flaky lightwalletd GetTransaction) were silently dropped and never
retried, leaving the send permanently invisible in history (its change note
is is_change=1 and gets filtered out), while received txs were unaffected.

Add a self-healing catch-up pass: when the processor reaches the chain tip,
re-enhance every mined tx with raw IS NULL (scanned-but-not-enhanced),
recovering missing sends and memos. Re-armed whenever new blocks arrive so a
persistently failing tx is retried on the next sync instead of hammering the
node.

- DerivedDataDb: findUnenhancedTransactions() (block NOT NULL AND raw NULL)
- TransactionRepository/PagedTransactionRepository: expose it
- CompactBlockProcessor: enhanceUnenhancedTransactions() + didReenhanceAtTip
  gate, invoked once per reach-tip in processNewBlocks

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.8 <noreply@anthropic.com>

workflow_runs.name: Build DragonX Wallet APK
workflow_runs.display_title: fix(send): 转账内部 NPE 友好化 + 完整堆栈落日志 + 埋点不挡转账 v1.6.2

head_commit.message:
fix(send): 转账内部 NPE 友好化 + 完整堆栈落日志 + 埋点不挡转账 v1.6.2

有人反馈转账弹 "Parameter specified as non-null is null ... checkNotNullParameter
parameter <this>"(Kotlin 内部空指针,发生在真正花钱之前→资金未动)。无法在本机复现
(报告者非连接设备),故:
1) SendFragment: 捕获处把完整 stackTraceToString() 写入文件日志(dragonx-sync.log),
   下次报告即可精确定位行号;describeError() 把 NPE/Intrinsics/non-null 类内部崩溃翻译为
   "程序内部出错、钱没动、请重启重试"友好提示,不再泄漏 Kotlin 内部。validate 与 runSend
   两处 catch 统一走 describeError + 全堆栈日志。
2) SendViewModel.send(): funnel(SendSelected)/funnel(SpendingKeyFound)/reportUserInputIssues
   全部 runCatching 包裹——埋点/analytics(Feedback.report 用 lateinit scope)绝不该挡住
   真实交易。

版本 1.6.2 (1_06_02_800)。

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.8 <noreply@anthropic.com>

workflow_runs.name: Build DragonX Wallet APK
workflow_runs.display_title: fix+feat: 根治损坏库永不自愈(余额更新中) + 钱包改名 v1.6.1

head_commit.message:
fix+feat: 根治损坏库永不自愈(余额更新中) + 钱包改名 v1.6.1

1) 余额一直"更新中"/转出没统计到 的根因(adb 日记实锤):某钱包本地区块库
   database disk image is malformed,每批扫描都失败、根本扫不动→余额/交易统计不全;
   首页因 isEffectivelySynced(距链顶<100块) 显示"已同步"掩盖了没真正扫完。
   旧自愈逻辑有反效果 bug:损坏后内核重试 backoff 指数级涨到~10min,而 onProcessorError
   的"45s 没出错就清零 dbErrorStreak"——一旦 backoff>45s,streak 每次被清零、永远到不了
   阈值 10 → 损坏库永不自动修复、永久卡死。
   修复:去掉 45s 时间重置,改为只靠"扫描有真进展"(onScanMetricComplete 已 reset)判断恢复;
   阈值 10→4,使其在 backoff 涨大前(~1-2min)就自动 clearBlockDataAndRestart 重建干净。
   (wallet_1 新库实测 0→100% 秒级干净同步,证明 wipe+rebuild 必然修好。)

2) 钱包改名:WalletManager.rename(i,label) 只改 slot label、不动密钥/DB;
   WalletManagerScreen 每行加「改名」+ 改名弹窗;WalletManagerFragment 改用 walletsState
   即时刷新(rename 不重启)。

版本 1.6.1 (1_06_01_800)。

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.8 <noreply@anthropic.com>

workflow_runs.name: Build DragonX Wallet APK
workflow_runs.display_title: feat: 多钱包恢复(助记词/私钥) + 检查更新 + 切换钱包密钥安全加固 v1.6.0

head_commit.message:
feat: 多钱包恢复(助记词/私钥) + 检查更新 + 切换钱包密钥安全加固 v1.6.0

1) 多钱包恢复:以前只有首启引导页有恢复入口,建好钱包后就再也进不去,
   多钱包用户无法恢复。WalletManagerScreen 新增「用助记词恢复」「用私钥恢复」
   两个按钮 → 复用现有 RestoreFragment/PrivateKeyRestoreFragment,通过 nav 参数
   createNewWallet=true 改为"新增一个钱包槽"模式(WalletManager.restoreFromSeed /
   restoreFromSpendingKey:派生 vk、写入新 slot 的独立 alias DB、switchTo+restart)。
   不影响现有钱包。

2) 私钥恢复按钮:落地页「用私钥恢复」从不起眼的灰字 TextButton 升级为正式
   OutlinedButton,首启与切换/新建钱包两处都清晰可点。

3) 切换钱包密钥安全加固(funds-safety):loadIntoActive 先 delete 所有 live 密钥材料
   (SEED/SEED_PHRASE/SPENDING_KEY/VK/PUB)再精确载入目标 slot;修掉"从助记词钱包
   切到私钥钱包时旧 SEED 残留 → Keys.activeSpendingKey 用错私钥签名"的隐患。
   HAS_SEED/HAS_SEED_PHRASE 改为按 slot 实际内容推导(兼容旧 slot),HAS_BACKUP=true
   保证切到私钥钱包(无 seed)时 checkSeed 不会误判 NO_SEED。

4) 检查更新(reminder-only):新增 ext/UpdateChecker(读 GitHub releases/latest,从
   universal APK 资源名解析最新版本号+下载链接,语义版本比较,联网失败静默降级)。
   ProfileScreen 底部显示 当前版本 vs 最新版本:有新版→「在线更新」「下载 APK」按钮;
   已最新→✓;失败→「点击检查更新」。绝不自动下载/安装。

版本 1.6.0 (1_06_00_800)。

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.8 <noreply@anthropic.com>
